Review_Period: The quarter and year when the staff cyber policy review was conducted.
Reviewer: The person who conducted and streamlined the staff cyber policy review.
Review_Method: The method or tool used to conduct the staff cyber policy review.
Total_Participants: The total number of employees who participated in the policy review.
Confirmation_Rate_Before: The confirmation rate of employees understanding the cyber policy before the review was streamlined.
Confirmation_Rate_After: The confirmation rate of employees understanding the cyber policy after the review was streamlined.
